name: AI Receipt Assistant
description: AI-powered receipt and invoice recognition app with photo upload, auto-recognition, and database storage
logs: Created invoice recognition app with photo/batch upload, AI recognition, edit form, and monthly grouped history display
Fixed broken thumbnail images with fallback handling and translated all UI text to English
Added inline editing below selected invoice card and image lightbox for thumbnail zoom
Changed invoice history from grid to row-based list layout with inline preview below selected row
Added click-to-preview for images in expanded details form and PDF file preview support
Changed PDF preview to use Google Docs Viewer by default to avoid download popups
Added batch upload with progress bar and expandable confirmation for each file
Removed share feature, renamed app to AI Receipt Assistant, updated button text and description
